component.name: AccessBridge Desktop Agent
component.summary: Ambient accessibility companion for native desktop apps

description.p: The AccessBridge Desktop Agent runs alongside the browser extension to extend accessibility adaptations (font scaling, contrast, cursor size) into native Linux applications via AT-SPI.

ul.li: AT-SPI-based inspection of GNOME, KDE, Cinnamon, XFCE applications
Font scaling via gsettings (GNOME family) or kdeglobals (KDE)
Loopback IPC pairing with the browser extension (PSK-authenticated)
